name: 杂志大片/封面

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.model: person holding or wearing product in editorial pose
prompt_template.lighting: beauty dish + rim light, editorial setup
prompt_template.layout: magazine masthead area at top, barcode space at bottom

defaults.lighting: beauty dish from front-left, soft rim light on hair
defaults.layout: masthead area top, issue text bottom-left, barcode bottom-right

overrides.model: close-up portrait with glowing skin, holding skincare near face
overrides.makeup_hair: dewy natural, glossy lips, subtle smoky eye

overrides.model: full or 3/4 body shot wearing fashion product, confident pose
person in contemplative pose with fragrance bottle, atmospheric
overrides.background: dark moody backdrop with atmospheric haze
clean white studio, no backdrop color
overrides.layout: no masthead, clean full-bleed editorial image

category_tips.skincare: dewy skin, product held at chin level, beauty lighting
category_tips.fragrance: atmospheric smoke, contemplative mood, bottle prominent
category_tips.fashion: confident pose, outfit fully visible, dramatic lighting
category_tips.jewelry: close-up on hands/neck, editorial styling, luxury backdrop
category_tips.haircare: hair as hero element, movement and texture, beauty lighting
category_tips.makeup: bold lip or eye focus, product in hand, editorial beauty

examples: Beauty magazine cover. Woman with glowing skin holding {product} near face. Beauty dish lighting, soft background. Top area for masthead. Vogue-quality editorial, 8K, 1080x1350px

Fashion editorial magazine cover. Striking woman wearing {product} in contemplative pose. Bold makeup, sleek hair. High-contrast editorial lighting. Magazine layout overlay with border frame. 8K, 1080x1350px
anti_ai_tips: For authentic editorial feel: specify actual camera (Phase One IQ4, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2), add visible skin texture, use real beauty lighting terminology
